reason: The inference type is listed as 'assumption' (global hypothesis), but node 1.8.3 is NOT an assumption or axiom. It is a derived result that follows by applying the main theorem (node 1.3) in the setting of B(H) (node 1.8.1) using the GNS computation (node 1.8.2), and by invoking the Weis-Shirokov generalized affine map framework (node 1.2) for the unbounded case. The correct inference type should be 'derivation', 'specialization', or 'corollary'. Labeling this as 'assumption' incorrectly suggests it is an unproved axiom, when it is actually a theorem that recovers a known result (Weis-Shirokov Theorem 3).
